channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
item.description: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Wallet cluster earned $2.4M with 98% win rate on Polymarket military bets: Bubblemaps
item.description: Bubblemaps’ investigation found a cluster of nine accounts that generated $2.4 million with a near-perfect win rate on Polymarket contracts tied to major US military operations.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Swan Bitcoin sued for nearly $1B over pre-bankruptcy transfers from Prime Trust
item.description: Swan Bitcoin has been sued for allegedly using insider access to pull nearly $1 billion in Bitcoin and cash from Prime Trust days before its 2023 bankruptcy filing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Republican lawmakers call for permanent CBDC ban as House vote approaches
item.description: Tom Emmer, the House majority whip, is also advocating for his Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, which has passed the House but has yet to pass the Senate.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sees 2 more high-profile departures
item.description: Ethereum Foundation researchers Julian Ma and Carl Beek have resigned, bringing the total number of major departures from the nonprofit to at least eight in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed
item.description: Among those who used crypto for payments, over 25% said they did so because the business preferred crypto, citing speed, privacy and lower cost advantages.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise
item.description: The hacker has already laundered nearly 5% of the loot through Tornado Cash and is still holding the remaining 955 eBTC.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Ether pullback was ‘attractive opportunity’ for 71,672 ETH buy: Bitmine’s Lee
item.description: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee said the company is expected to have accumulated 5% of Ether's total supply before the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: SEC to make ‘innovation exemption’ for tokenized stock trading: Report
item.description: Several SEC officials reportedly didn’t support the decision, while tokenization platform Securitize flagged risks with enabling third-party platforms to issue tokenized stocks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Retail Bitcoin investor demand falls by 73% as futures selling tops $2B: Are the bears back?
item.description: Bitcoin retail inflows to Binance remained at record lows as aggressive BTC futures selling and weakening spot demand pressured BTC below $77,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Odds against rate cuts high as new US Fed chair set for swearing in
item.description: Many experts voiced concerns that the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair would lead to uncertainty about the central bank’s independence, particularly in setting interest rates.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Galaxy secures New York BitLicense to expand institutional crypto services
item.description: The NYDFS approvals allow GalaxyOne Prime NY to offer trading and financing services to institutional investors in one of the most tightly regulated US crypto markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin lost its hold on $80K, but three events may send it back sooner than markets expect
item.description: Bitcoin positions itself for a rally above $80,000 after Strategy's $2 billion BTC buy, crumbling investor confidence in the US Treasury and a potential US-Iran deal.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Soluna revenue jumps 58% as hosting business offsets weaker Bitcoin mining
item.description: Hosting revenue outpaced mining as new capacity came online, highlighting Soluna’s shift toward data centers for AI and high-performance computing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Georgia primary to test crypto PAC’s support for Democratic candidate
item.description: A political action committee aligned with crypto interest groups reported spending more than $4 million in support of Democratic US House candidate Jasmine Clark in Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin’s trend-defining battle starts at $74K support: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin traders are closely watching the $74,000-$75,000 support zone as exchange inflows rise and market signals weaken following BTC's loss of momentum above $82,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Price predictions 5/18: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin dropped to the crucial $76,000 support level while large-cap altcoins sold off sharply. Do technical charts suggest that traders will buy the dip?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
item.description: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
item.description: Institutional investors pulled capital from Bitcoin and Ether products as Iran tension and rising inflation rattled markets, while XRP and Solana funds continued to attract fresh inflows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Ethereum traders say bears ‘in control’ after ETH price drop to $2K
item.description: Ether price fell sharply below $2,100 as increasing sell pressure on Binance and persistent ETF outflows fueled bearish momentum.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Hyperliquid eyes 55% price rise after Silicon Valley investor's 'massive HYPE buy'
item.description: A bullish long-term chart pattern puts HYPE on track for a potential rally above $70 this year, with a16z-linked accumulation and fresh institutional catalysts strengthening the case.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
item.description: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin Depot stock crashes 71% premarket after Chapter 11 filing
item.description: Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 in Texas, plans asset sale and wind-down as regulatory pressure forces shutdown of its Bitcoin ATM network.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Deploi Launches Direct Issuance Infrastructure for Private Credit on Polygon, Secures ISIN Allocations from Nasdaq CSD
item.description: EUR 1 billion note programme planned for 2026 following completion of global issuance infrastructure by the end of Q3 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Saylor’s Strategy scoops $2B Bitcoin, holdings reach 843,738 BTC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 24,869 Bitcoin for $2.01 billion last week, lifting holdings to 843,738 BTC as STRC sales funded around 97% of the acquisition.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Standard Chartered to absorb Zodia Custody’s core business, spin out Zodia Solutions
item.description: Standard Chartered will absorb Zodia Custody’s regulated crypto business and spin out Zodia Solutions, as big banks move to own core digital asset custody in-house.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: South Korea's KB Financial completes stablecoin pilot for offline payments
item.description: The parent company of South Korea’s largest bank completed a stablecoin payment pilot ahead of the country's proposed digital asset framework.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin falls to $76K after Trump says ‘clock is ticking’ for Iran
item.description: Bitcoin analysis says BTC price could revisit the $65,000 demand area after fresh US-Iran war tensions soured the crypto market mood.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: XRP price may explode to $15 amid 'quiet accumulation,' analyst claims
item.description: XRP still faces short-term downside risk, with a symmetrical triangle breakdown pointing to a possible drop toward $1.00–$1.10.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola
